case_title: WALAND, N. D. vs. MAGGIOLO, JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALAND, N. D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGGIOLO, JOSEPH LEVINE, LAURA PAULINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 664 LARKIN ST #10, LEASE FORFEITED
